caption: POV: You're sleeping 7вАУ8 hours, but still waking up exhausted. рЯСА For weeks, I blamed stress, work, and screen time. If you are looking for one of the best vegetarian meals in Bangalore, then Koteshwaram вАУ The Temple of Divine Food is a must visit! вЬ® From ghee-loaded South Indian meals to delicious North Indian thalis with veg biryani, every single dish here feels comforting and soulful. The 1,000-year-old secret youвАЩve been driving right pastвА¶ вАЛEveryone wakes up at 4 AM to catch the sunrise at Nandi Hills, but 90% of people completely miss the ancient masterpiece sitting right at the bottom. вАЛBuilt originally in the 9th century, the Sri Bhoga Nandishwara Gudi isn't just an architectural marvelвАФitвАЩs a living energy center. If you look closely at the pillars, you can see the distinct craftsmanship of five different empires (including the Cholas and Hoysalas). вАЛ вАЛ Distance: ~60km from Bangalore (perfect for a morning ride). вП∞ Best time to visit: Arrive by 7:30 AM before the crowd hits and the sun gets too harsh. вАЛ вАЛ#BhogaNandishwara #BangaloreTravel #NandiHills #KarnatakaTourism #BangaloreDiaries HiddenGemsIndia IncredibleIndia ExploreKarnataka
